profiles.description: One row per authenticated user. Auto-created by trigger on auth.users INSERT. Stores spending limits and preferences.

categories.description: Expense/income categories. Rows with user_id = NULL are system defaults visible to all users (13 seeded). Users can create their own. Soft-deleted via deleted_at.

columns.name: user_id
columns.fk: profiles.id  ON DELETE CASCADE  (NULL = system default)

rls_policies.name: categories: select own and defaults
rls_policies.using: deleted_at IS NULL AND (user_id IS NULL OR (SELECT auth.uid()) = user_id)

known_issues: ⚠️ No updated_at column — category edits leave no audit trail

accounts.description: All user money accounts: cash wallets, bank accounts, credit cards, UPI, digital wallets. Multiple accounts per user supported. Exactly one account per user can be is_default=true (enforced by partial unique index). First account auto-set as default by trigger. Soft-deleted via deleted_at.

rls_policies.name: accounts: own rows
rls_policies.using: (SELECT auth.uid()) = user_id AND deleted_at IS NULL

known_issues: ⚠️ Soft-deleted accounts are hidden by RLS but transactions hold a RESTRICT FK — app must only ever soft-delete accounts, never hard-delete
⚠️ recurring_rules.account_id is RESTRICT — must deactivate recurring rules before soft-deleting an account

recurring_rules.description: Template definitions for auto-repeating income or expense transactions (salary, rent, EMI, subscriptions). App reads next_due_date to generate transactions on schedule.

transactions.description: Core financial ledger. Every income, expense, and transfer entry. Soft-deleted via deleted_at. Supports linking to savings goals, projects, and recurring rules. Partial indexes optimise all common query patterns.

rls_policies.name: transactions: own rows
rls_policies.using: (SELECT auth.uid()) = user_id AND deleted_at IS NULL

known_issues: ⚠️ savings_goal trigger fires only on INSERT — soft-deleting a transaction does not decrement savings_goals.current_amount. Must recalculate in app layer.

transfers.description: Records account-to-account money movements. Each transfer links two transaction rows (a debit on from_account and a credit on to_account).

columns.name: from_transaction_id
columns.fk: transactions.id  ON DELETE CASCADE  ⚠️ should be SET NULL

columns.name: to_transaction_id
columns.fk: transactions.id  ON DELETE CASCADE  ⚠️ should be SET NULL

known_issues: 🔴 from/to_transaction_id ON DELETE CASCADE — if a transaction is ever hard-deleted the transfer record silently disappears. Change to SET NULL.
⚠️ No updated_at or soft_delete — transfers are immutable once created.

budgets.description: Per-category or overall spending limits for weekly/monthly/yearly periods. category_id=NULL means the budget applies to all spending. Soft-deleted via deleted_at.

columns.name: category_id
columns.fk: categories.id  ON DELETE CASCADE  ⚠️ should be SET NULL

rls_policies.name: budgets: own rows
rls_policies.using: (SELECT auth.uid()) = user_id AND deleted_at IS NULL

known_issues: 🔴 category_id ON DELETE CASCADE — deleting a category hard-deletes all associated budgets. Change to SET NULL.

savings_goals.description: Target-based savings tracker. current_amount is auto-incremented by a trigger when a transaction with savings_goal_id is inserted. is_achieved auto-set when current_amount >= target_amount.

loans.description: Loan tracking with full EMI automation. next_emi_date auto-advances after each payment. Links to an account for balance monitoring and low-balance alerts.

loan_payments.description: Immutable ledger of every loan payment. Supports EMI, interest-only, extra prepayment, partial, and foreclosure payment types. Trigger auto-updates parent loans row after each insert.
known_issues: ⚠️ No is_reversed flag — incorrect payments have no correction path. Recommend adding is_reversed boolean + reversed_at timestamptz.

debts.description: Track informal money owed to/from people. i_owe = user owes someone. they_owe = someone owes user. settled_at records when resolved.
known_issues: ⚠️ No transaction_id FK — settling a debt cannot be linked to the actual payment transaction.

subscriptions.description: Dedicated subscription tracker separate from recurring_rules. Tracks services like Netflix, Spotify, gym. last_used_date enables unused-subscription detection. next_renewal_date drives reminders.

projects.description: Group transactions under a named project or event (e.g. Goa Trip, Home Renovation, Diwali 2025). Optional budget for the project. Transactions link via project_id.

notification_settings.description: Per-user notification preferences. One row per user, auto-created on profile insert. All notifications default to enabled.

columns.name: budget_alert_threshold
columns.note: % of budget used before alert fires

net_worth_snapshots.description: Monthly point-in-time snapshot of user's total assets vs total debts. net_worth is a generated stored column (total_assets - total_debts). Use these to draw a wealth timeline chart.

wishlist.description: Future purchase tracker. Optional link to a savings_goal to track saving toward a specific item. Priority helps user focus. is_purchased marks completion.

loan_analytics.description: Full per-loan analytics joined with payment history and linked account balance.

output_fields.estimated_months_to_finish: computed from outstanding_amount and interest rate

emi_reminders.description: Surfaces loans with EMI due within emi_reminder_days from today. Used for push notifications.

financial_health.description: Computes a 0–100 financial health score for each user from this month's data. Built from 4 components of 25 points each.

scoring.savings_rate_score: 25 pts — (income − expense) / income. Full score at ≥ 20% savings rate
scoring.budget_score: 25 pts — ratio of active budgets not exceeded this month
scoring.debt_score: 25 pts — lower total_emi / monthly_income ratio = higher score
scoring.emergency_fund_score: 25 pts — full score when savings_goals.current_amount covers 3+ months of expenses

functions.name: handle_updated_at
functions.description: Sets NEW.updated_at = NOW() on every row UPDATE. Used by all tables with an updated_at column.

functions.name: handle_new_user
functions.description: Auto-inserts a row into public.profiles when a new user is created in auth.users. Reads full_name and avatar_url from raw_user_meta_data.

functions.name: handle_new_profile_notifications
functions.description: Auto-inserts a default notification_settings row when a profiles row is created.

functions.name: handle_first_account_default
functions.description: On account INSERT, if no other account exists for this user, sets NEW.is_default = TRUE automatically.

functions.name: handle_account_default_update
functions.description: On account UPDATE, prevents unsetting is_default=true if no other account for this user is already default. Raises an exception with a clear message.

functions.name: handle_savings_goal_transaction
functions.description: On transaction INSERT where savings_goal_id is set, increments savings_goals.current_amount by the transaction amount and sets is_achieved=true if target is met.

functions.name: handle_loan_payment
functions.description: On loan_payment INSERT, updates the parent loans row: decrements outstanding_amount, increments months_paid, advances next_emi_date by 1 month, and sets is_active=false when outstanding_amount <= 0 or payment_type = 'foreclosure'.

open_issues.fix: Change from/to_transaction_id ON DELETE CASCADE → SET NULL
Change category_id ON DELETE CASCADE → SET NULL
Document and enforce soft-delete-only policy for accounts in app layer
Consider re-adding currency_code for display preferences
